name: Falco Resources Ltd.
description: Falco Resources Ltd. is a Canada-based junior mineral exploration company. The Company is one of the largest mineral claim holders in the province of Quebec, with control of approximately 67,000 hectares of land in the Rouyn-Noranda mining camp. Falco's principal asset is the Horne 5 Project, located in the former Horne mine, which was operated by Noranda from 1927 to 1976 and produced approximately 11.6 million ounces of gold and 2.5 billion pounds of copper. The company is focused on the exploration and development of gold, copper, and zinc resources in the region.
